mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.transfer_id, t0.project_id, t0.compensation_money, t0.compensation_date, t0.manage, t0.law_firm_id, t0.contract_id, t0.collection_amount, t0.residue_compensation, t0.primary_affiliated_org, t0.affiliated_org, t0.lawyers, t0.is_deleted
